description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-time-picker` (T2-33). 2/6 libraries — healthcare-critical (medication schedules, appointments). NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-time-picker/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, 12/24-hour format support, HH:mm value typing, AM/PM toggle typing, step/minute-interval props
2. Accessibility — hour/minute inputs or spinners with `role="spinbutton"`, `aria-valuemin`/`aria-valuemax`/`aria-valuenow`, AM/PM button accessible, keyboard (arrows increment/decrement, Tab between segments), axe-core pass
3. Tests — 12h/24h mode, AM/PM toggle, minute stepping, form association, value parsing
4. Storybook — 12h/24h variants, step demos, error states
5. CSS — segment layout, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-time-picker/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-time-picker — T2-33 antagonistic quality review
